dns_server.title: DNS Server Configuration
dns_server.description:
Enter the IP address of the DNS server to use for hostname resolution.
Default: {default_dns}

another.title: Add Another Target
another.description: Do you want to add another target? Currently configured: {target_count}

interval.title: Update Interval
interval.description: How often to check targets (in seconds)

user.title: Add Device
user.description: Choose the type of device to add

esphome_device.title: Add ESPHome Device
esphome_device.description: Select an ESPHome device registered in Home Assistant to monitor

esphome_configure.title: Configure ESPHome Device
esphome_configure.description: Set a friendly name and alert settings for **{device_name}** ({device_id})

network.title: Add Network Device
network.description: Configure a network device to monitor

zha_device.title: Add ZigBee Device (ZHA)
zha_device.description: Select a ZigBee device discovered by ZHA to monitor

zha_configure.title: Configure ZigBee Device
zha_configure.description: Set a friendly name and inactivity timeout for **{device_name}** ({ieee})

matter_device.title: Add Matter Device
matter_device.description: Select a Matter device registered in Home Assistant to monitor

matter_configure.title: Configure Matter Device
matter_configure.description: Set a friendly name and alert settings for **{device_name}** ({node_id})

bluetooth_device.title: Add Bluetooth Device
bluetooth_device.description: Select a Bluetooth device registered in Home Assistant to monitor

bluetooth_configure.title: Configure Bluetooth Device
bluetooth_configure.description: Set a friendly name and alert settings for **{device_name}** ({bt_address})

error.unknown: Unexpected error occurred. Please check Home Assistant logs.
error.no_zha_devices: No ZigBee devices found. Make sure ZHA is configured and has discovered devices.
error.all_zha_devices_added: All discovered ZigBee devices are already being monitored.
error.no_matter_devices: No Matter devices found. Make sure the Matter integration is configured and has commissioned devices.
error.all_matter_devices_added: All commissioned Matter devices are already being monitored.
error.no_esphome_devices: No ESPHome devices found. Make sure the ESPHome integration is configured and has devices.
error.all_esphome_devices_added: All ESPHome devices are already being monitored.
error.no_bluetooth_devices: No Bluetooth devices found. Make sure Bluetooth is configured and devices are available in Home Assistant.
error.all_bluetooth_devices_added: All Bluetooth devices are already being monitored.

network_menu.title: Network Device

zha_menu.title: ZigBee (ZHA) Device
zha_menu.description: Choose an action for your ZigBee device

matter_menu.title: Matter Device
matter_menu.description: Choose an action for your Matter device

device_select.title: Select Device
device_select.description: Choose which device to modify alert settings for

alert_config.title: Alert Configuration
alert_config.description: Configure alert settings for the selected device

remove_device.title: Remove Device
remove_device.description: Choose device to remove. All sensors for this device will be removed.

rename_host.title: Change Host Address / Device Name
rename_host.description: Enter the new host IP or FQDN for this device

remove_zha_device.title: Remove ZigBee Device (ZHA)
remove_zha_device.description: Select the ZigBee device to stop monitoring

remove_matter_device.title: Remove Matter Device
remove_matter_device.description: Select the Matter device to stop monitoring

esphome_menu.title: ESPHome Device
esphome_menu.description: Choose an action for your ESPHome device

esphome_alert_select.title: Modify ESPHome Alert Settings

esphome_alert_config.title: ESPHome Alert Configuration
esphome_alert_config.description: Configure alert settings for the selected ESPHome device

remove_esphome_device.title: Remove ESPHome Device
remove_esphome_device.description: Select the ESPHome device to stop monitoring

bluetooth_menu.title: Bluetooth Device
bluetooth_menu.description: Choose an action for your Bluetooth device

bluetooth_alert_select.title: Modify Bluetooth Alert Settings
bluetooth_alert_select.description: Select the Bluetooth device to configure alerts for

bluetooth_alert_config.title: Bluetooth Alert Configuration
bluetooth_alert_config.description: Configure alert settings for the selected Bluetooth device

remove_bluetooth_device.title: Remove Bluetooth Device
remove_bluetooth_device.description: Select the Bluetooth device to stop monitoring

zha_alert_select.title: Modify ZigBee Alert Settings
zha_alert_select.description: Select the ZigBee device to configure alerts for

zha_alert_config.title: ZigBee Alert Configuration
zha_alert_config.description: Configure alert settings for the selected ZigBee device

zha_select_for_timeout.title: Change ZigBee Inactivity Timeout
zha_select_for_timeout.description: Select the ZigBee device to update

zha_update_timeout.title: Update Inactivity Timeout
zha_update_timeout.description: A device is considered Inactive when it has not been seen within the configured timeout

matter_alert_select.title: Modify Matter Alert Settings
matter_alert_select.description: Select the Matter device to configure alerts for

matter_alert_config.title: Matter Alert Configuration
matter_alert_config.description: Configure alert settings for the selected Matter device
